title: Warm Crispy Saudi Arabian Linguine Pasta
description: A peppery and crispy weeknight Saudi-Arabian dish featuring linguine pasta, this vegan-friendly recipe is perfect for a quick dinner, with a blend of sautéed vegetables and spices that give it a distinct flavor.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the linguine pasta according to the package instructions until it is al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat and add the chopped onion, cooking until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped red bell pepper to the skillet and cook until it is tender.
Stir in the tomato paste, smoked paprika, black pepper, and salt, and cook for 1 minute.
Drain the cooked linguine pasta and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the vegetable mixture.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the pasta is well coated and slightly crispy.
Remove the skillet from the heat and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the warm crispy Saudi Arabian linguine pasta immediately.
